title: Apple issues emergency fixes for Coruna flaws in older iOS versions

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Apple issues emergency fixes for Coruna flaws in older iOS v
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX

            - '*min.js*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
